Action: Loaded 50,000 rows from Bridge to Algebra (KDD Cup 2010)
Removed exact duplicate rows using drop_duplicates()
Median imputation for numeric columns; "Unknown" fill for categorical
Problem Hierarchy converted to ordinal codes via .cat.codes
Derived: engagement_ratio, consistency_index, mastery_trend, timeliness, student_ability, problem_difficulty
Applied SMOTE to training set for class balance
StandardScaler applied to all model features (zero mean, unit variance)
